description: Per-publication community chronicle attestation. G4 STRUCTURAL: toneAttestation enum DELIBERATELY excludes apocalyptic/clickbait/engagement-optimized; nonEschatologicalAttested const true (Charter §1.15 non-eschatological invariant). G9 STRUCTURAL: licenseAttested const 'apache-2.0-with-charter-rider-v2.0'.

publicationBodyCid.description: IPFS CID of publication full text (Apache 2.0 + Charter Rider per G9)

communitySiteCid.description: Community site identifier; cross-link to Land Registry if applicable

toneAttestation.description: G4 STRUCTURAL: enum DELIBERATELY excludes 'apocalyptic' / 'clickbait' / 'engagement-optimized' / 'sensationalized' / 'crisis-amplifying' (Charter §1.15 non-eschatological invariant)

nonEschatologicalAttested.description: G4 STRUCTURAL: const true; no apocalyptic / rapture / 末法 / 千年王国 framing

kataribeOfficiantDid.description: Kataribe officiant DID; G11 STRUCTURAL vocation-flow L5 verified via chigiri.stewardLaborAttestation cross-link

multiGenCohortMix.description: G10 (multi-gen invariant per Charter §1.7): publication accessibility across cohorts

translationCidsAvailable.description: Cross-link to translationAttestation CIDs for multilingual versions
